content.query:
------ROUND ROBIN TABLE

CREATE TABLE round_table
(
    id int,
    name varchar(4000),
    salary INT
)
WITH
(
    DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN
);

INSERT into round_table
VALUES
(1,'aa',100)

SELECT * from round_table


-----REPLACTE TABLE
CREATE SCHEMA gold;

CREATE TABLE gold.dim_product
(
    dim_key INT,
    prod_id int,
    prod_name VARCHAR(4000)
)
WITH
(
    DISTRIBUTION = REPLICATE
);
SELECT * from gold.dim_product

---HASH DISTRIBUTION 

create TABLE gold.facttable
(
    dim_keyword_prod INT,
    revenue INT,
    cost INT
)
WITH(
    DISTRIBUTION = HASH(dim_keyword_prod)
)
